actionCalls.name: myRule_105_A1
actionCalls.label: Investor Solution Request has been submitted

actionCalls.name: myRule_122_A1
actionCalls.label: Send new DDQ email to recipient

actionCalls.name: myRule_124_A2
actionCalls.label: "Your DDQ has been automatically completed" alert

actionCalls.name: myRule_126_A1
actionCalls.label: Send alert when status changed to Pending Client

rules.name: myRule_116
rules.label: Is RT Legal_Services and pending update from Billing

rules.name: myRule_118
rules.label: SW Template = Not yet (Yes, No, but there is..)

rules.name: myRule_13
rules.label: Legal - Pending Rep To Adjust Quote With Error

rules.name: myRule_124
rules.label: SW Template = Yes, the client had accepted it

rules.name: myRule_126
rules.label: Send an email alert when status changed to Pending client

rules.name: myRule_128
rules.label: SW Template = Yes, pending client review

rules.name: myRule_15
rules.label: Legal - Pending Rep To Adjust Quote

rules.name: myRule_3
rules.label: DDQ Complexity Alert (Yes/No, but there is...)

rules.name: myRule_31
rules.label: ASR Request moved to Verbally Confirmed

rules.name: myRule_36
rules.label: ASR Request moved to Closed Won, Completed, Initiated

rules.name: myRule_7
rules.label: Update Quote Status for Legal Request

rules.name: myRule_9
rules.label: Legal - Pending Legal Or Billing request

rules.name: myRule_82
rules.label: Legal Status Changed - Legal is recipient

value.stringValue: Case([Request__c].Account__r.ARR_Bucket__c , 'Bucket 1','Insight Email', 'Bucket 2', 'Insight Email;Training Session', 'Bucket 3', 'Insight Email;Training Session;Short Deck', 'Bucket 4', 'Insight Email;Training Session;Short Deck;Large Deck', null)

formulas.name: formula_133_myRule_132_A1_0870835929
formulas.expression: Case({!myVariable_current.Account__r.ARR_Bucket__c} , 'Bucket 1','Insight Email', 'Bucket 2', 'Insight Email;Training Session', 'Bucket 3', 'Insight Email;Training Session;Short Deck', 'Bucket 4', 'Insight Email;Training Session;Short Deck;Large Deck', null)

value.stringValue: IF(NOT(ISBLANK([Request__c].Account__c ) ) , "Country: "&[Request__c].Account__c.BillingCountry & BR()& "State: "&[Request__c].Account__c.BillingState & BR() & "City: "&[Request__c].Account__c.BillingCity & BR() & "Street: "&[Request__c].Account__c.BillingStreet & BR()& "Zip/Postal code: "&[Request__c].Account__c.BillingPostalCode,"")

AND( OR( ISNEW() , ISCHANGED([Request__c].Status__c ), ISCHANGED([Request__c].List_price__c) ) , NOT(ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Status__c, "Closed Won")), [Request__c].RecordTypeId = "0120X0000005lrhQAA")

AND( [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Legal_Services', [Request__c].Account__c != Null, isChanged([Request__c].Status__c), TEXT([Request__c].Status__c) = 'Pending update from Billing', OR( [Request__c].Ticket_number_in_Zendesk__c = Null, CONTAINS([Request__c].Ticket_number_in_Zendesk__c, 'Error') ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_116
formulas.expression: AND( {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Legal_Services', {!myVariable_current.Account__c} != Null, isChanged({!myVariable_current.Status__c}), TEXT({!myVariable_current.Status__c}) = 'Pending update from Billing', OR( {!myVariable_current.Ticket_number_in_Zendesk__c} = Null, CONTAINS({!myVariable_current.Ticket_number_in_Zendesk__c}, 'Error') ) )

value.stringValue: AND( [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Legal_Services', [Request__c].Account__c != Null, isChanged([Request__c].Status__c), TEXT([Request__c].Status__c) = 'Pending update from Billing', OR( [Request__c].Ticket_number_in_Zendesk__c = Null, CONTAINS([Request__c].Ticket_number_in_Zendesk__c, 'Error') ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_116_pmetrule
formulas.expression: AND( {!myVariable_old.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Legal_Services', {!myVariable_old.Account__c} != Null, isChanged({!myVariable_old.Status__c}), TEXT({!myVariable_old.Status__c}) = 'Pending update from Billing', OR( {!myVariable_old.Ticket_number_in_Zendesk__c} = Null, CONTAINS({!myVariable_old.Ticket_number_in_Zendesk__c}, 'Error') ) )

value.stringValue: AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED([Request__c].Did_we_try_to_send_the_SW_template__c) ), [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = "Supplier_Questionnaires", ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Did_we_try_to_send_the_SW_template__c, "Not yet"), OR( ISPICKVAL([Request__c].A_Signed_NDA__c ,'Yes'), ISPICKVAL([Request__c].A_Signed_NDA__c ,'No, but there is a customer contract in place with a confidentiality provision') ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_118
formulas.expression: AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Did_we_try_to_send_the_SW_template__c}) ), {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} = "Supplier_Questionnaires", ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Did_we_try_to_send_the_SW_template__c}, "Not yet"), OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.A_Signed_NDA__c} ,'Yes'), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.A_Signed_NDA__c} ,'No, but there is a customer contract in place with a confidentiality provision') ) )

value.stringValue: AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED([Request__c].Did_we_try_to_send_the_SW_template__c) ), [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = "Supplier_Questionnaires", ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Did_we_try_to_send_the_SW_template__c, "Yes, the client had accepted it") )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_124
formulas.expression: AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Did_we_try_to_send_the_SW_template__c}) ), {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} = "Supplier_Questionnaires", ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Did_we_try_to_send_the_SW_template__c}, "Yes, the client had accepted it") )

value.stringValue: AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED([Request__c].Did_we_try_to_send_the_SW_template__c) ), [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = "Supplier_Questionnaires", ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Did_we_try_to_send_the_SW_template__c, "Yes, pending client review") )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_128
formulas.expression: AND( OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Did_we_try_to_send_the_SW_template__c}) ), {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} = "Supplier_Questionnaires", ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Did_we_try_to_send_the_SW_template__c}, "Yes, pending client review") )

value.stringValue: AND( [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Legal_Services', ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Status__c , 'Pending Rep To Adjust Quote') , CONTAINS([Request__c].Ticket_number_in_Zendesk__c , 'Unsupported request type'), ISCHANGED([Request__c].Status__c) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_13
formulas.expression: AND( {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Legal_Services', ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Status__c} , 'Pending Rep To Adjust Quote') , CONTAINS({!myVariable_current.Ticket_number_in_Zendesk__c} , 'Unsupported request type'), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Status__c}) )

value.stringValue:
OR( AND( ISNEW(), [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName ="Vendor_Form",
NOT(ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Request_Type__c ,'Extensions request')), ISBLANK([Request__c].Ticket_number_in_Zendesk__c ) ), AND( ISCHANGED([Request__c].Status__c ) , ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Status__c , 'Approved') ,
ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Request_Type__c ,'Extensions request'), ISBLANK([Request__c].Ticket_number_in_Zendesk__c ) ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_135
formulas.expression:
OR( AND( ISNEW(), {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} ="Vendor_Form",
NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Request_Type__c} ,'Extensions request')), ISBLANK({!myVariable_current.Ticket_number_in_Zendesk__c} ) ), AND( ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Status__c} ) , ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Status__c} , 'Approved') ,
ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Request_Type__c} ,'Extensions request'), ISBLANK({!myVariable_current.Ticket_number_in_Zendesk__c} ) ) )

value.stringValue: AND( [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Legal_Services', ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Status__c , 'Pending Rep To Adjust Quote') , NOT(CONTAINS([Request__c].Ticket_number_in_Zendesk__c , 'Unsupported request type')), ISCHANGED([Request__c].Status__c) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_15
formulas.expression: AND( {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Legal_Services', ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Status__c} , 'Pending Rep To Adjust Quote') , NOT(CONTAINS({!myVariable_current.Ticket_number_in_Zendesk__c} , 'Unsupported request type')), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Status__c}) )

value.stringValue: AND ( [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Legal_Services', ISCHANGED([Request__c].Status__c), ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Status__c, 'Approved By Billing'), NOT(ISBLANK([Request__c].Quote__c)) )
AND ( [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Legal_Services', ISCHANGED([Request__c].Status__c), ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Status__c, 'Approved By Billing'), NOT(ISBLANK([Request__c].Quote__c)) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_17_pmetrule
formulas.expression: AND ( {!myVariable_old.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Legal_Services', ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.Status__c}), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.Status__c}, 'Approved By Billing'), NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_old.Quote__c})) )

value.stringValue:
AND( [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Solution_Implementation', OR( ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Request_Type__c ,'Growth'), ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Request_Type__c ,'Standard'), ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Request_Type__c , 'Premium')),
OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED([Request__c].Status__c) ),
ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Status__c, 'In Process') )

AND( [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Solution_Implementation', OR( ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Request_Type__c ,'Growth'), ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Request_Type__c ,'Standard'), ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Request_Type__c , 'Premium')),
OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED([Request__c].Status__c) ),
ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Status__c, 'Completed') )

AND( [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName ='Supplier_Questionnaires' , NOT(ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Complexity__c ,'')), ISCHANGED ([Request__c].Complexity__c ), OR( ISPICKVAL([Request__c].A_Signed_NDA__c ,'Yes'), ISPICKVAL([Request__c].A_Signed_NDA__c ,'No, but there is a customer contract in place with a confidentiality provision') ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_3
formulas.expression: AND( {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} ='Supplier_Questionnaires' , NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Complexity__c} ,'')), ISCHANGED ({!myVariable_current.Complexity__c} ), OR( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.A_Signed_NDA__c} ,'Yes'), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.A_Signed_NDA__c} ,'No, but there is a customer contract in place with a confidentiality provision') ) )

value.stringValue:
OR(
AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Request_Type__c ,'Extensions request')), ISCHANGED([Request__c].Status__c ) ),
AND( ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Request_Type__c ,'Extensions request'), ISCHANGED([Request__c].Status__c), NOT(ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Status__c,'Approved')), NOT(ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Status__c,'Rejected')), NOT(ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Status__c,'Recall')) )
)

formulas.name: formula_myRule_46
formulas.expression:
OR(
AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Request_Type__c} ,'Extensions request')), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Status__c} ) ),
AND( ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Request_Type__c} ,'Extensions request'), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Status__c}), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Status__c},'Approved')), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Status__c},'Rejected')), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Status__c},'Recall')) )
)

value.stringValue: AND( ISNEW(), NOT( ISBLANK( [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName)), NOT( ISBLANK( [Request__c].Recipient_Email__c)), TEXT([Request__c].Recipient_Picklist__c) <> 'Solution Consultants (Queue)', OR( [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Solution_Engineering', [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Strategic_Consultant', [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Solution_Implementation', [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Technical_Solutions', [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Trial_Request' ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_65
formulas.expression: AND( ISNEW(), NOT( ISBLANK( {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName})), NOT( ISBLANK( {!myVariable_current.Recipient_Email__c})), TEXT({!myVariable_current.Recipient_Picklist__c}) <> 'Solution Consultants (Queue)', OR( {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Solution_Engineering', {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Strategic_Consultant', {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Solution_Implementation', {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Technical_Solutions', {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Trial_Request' ) )

value.stringValue: AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Status__c, 'Pending Rep To Adjust Quote')), ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Recipient_Picklist__c , 'Legal'), [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Legal_Services', NOT(ISBLANK([Request__c].Requester_Email__c )), OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED([Request__c].Status__c ) ))

formulas.name: formula_myRule_82
formulas.expression: AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Status__c}, 'Pending Rep To Adjust Quote')), ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Recipient_Picklist__c} , 'Legal'), {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Legal_Services', NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_current.Requester_Email__c} )), OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Status__c} ) ))

value.stringValue: AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Status__c, 'Pending Rep To Adjust Quote')), NOT(ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Recipient_Picklist__c , 'Legal')), [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Legal_Services', NOT(ISBLANK([Request__c].Requester_Email__c )), OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED([Request__c].Status__c ) ))

formulas.name: formula_myRule_84
formulas.expression: AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Status__c}, 'Pending Rep To Adjust Quote')), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_current.Recipient_Picklist__c} , 'Legal')), {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Legal_Services', NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_current.Requester_Email__c} )), OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_current.Status__c} ) ))

value.stringValue: AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Status__c, 'Pending Rep To Adjust Quote')), NOT(ISPICKVAL([Request__c].Recipient_Picklist__c , 'Legal')), [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Legal_Services', NOT(ISBLANK([Request__c].Requester_Email__c )), OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED([Request__c].Status__c ) ))

formulas.name: formula_myRule_84_pmetrule
formulas.expression: AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.Status__c}, 'Pending Rep To Adjust Quote')), NOT(ISPICKVAL({!myVariable_old.Recipient_Picklist__c} , 'Legal')), {!myVariable_old.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Legal_Services', NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_old.Requester_Email__c} )), OR( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED({!myVariable_old.Status__c} ) ))

value.stringValue: AND( NOT( ISBLANK( [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName)), [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Legal_Services', ISCHANGED( [Request__c].Status__c ), TEXT( [Request__c].Status__c ) = 'Pending Action' )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_88
formulas.expression: AND( NOT( ISBLANK( {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName})), {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Legal_Services', ISCHANGED( {!myVariable_current.Status__c} ), TEXT( {!myVariable_current.Status__c} ) = 'Pending Action' )

value.stringValue: AND( NOT([Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Legal_Services'), ISCHANGED( [Request__c].Recipient_Picklist__c ), NOT(ISBLANK([Request__c].Recipient_Email__c)), [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName != 'Churn_Protection', OR( CONTAINS( $UserRole.DeveloperName , 'Consultant'), CONTAINS( $UserRole.DeveloperName , 'Client_Services'), CONTAINS( $UserRole.DeveloperName , 'Support'), [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Trial_Request' ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_90
formulas.expression: AND( NOT({!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Legal_Services'), ISCHANGED( {!myVariable_current.Recipient_Picklist__c} ), NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_current.Recipient_Email__c})), {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} != 'Churn_Protection', OR( CONTAINS( {!$UserRole.DeveloperName} , 'Consultant'), CONTAINS( {!$UserRole.DeveloperName} , 'Client_Services'), CONTAINS( {!$UserRole.DeveloperName} , 'Support'), {!myVariable_current.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Trial_Request' ) )

value.stringValue: AND( NOT([Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Legal_Services'), ISCHANGED( [Request__c].Recipient_Picklist__c ), NOT(ISBLANK([Request__c].Recipient_Email__c)), [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName != 'Churn_Protection', OR( CONTAINS( $UserRole.DeveloperName , 'Consultant'), CONTAINS( $UserRole.DeveloperName , 'Client_Services'), CONTAINS( $UserRole.DeveloperName , 'Support'), [Request__c].RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Trial_Request' ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_90_pmetrule
formulas.expression: AND( NOT({!myVariable_old.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Legal_Services'), ISCHANGED( {!myVariable_old.Recipient_Picklist__c} ), NOT(ISBLANK({!myVariable_old.Recipient_Email__c})), {!myVariable_old.RecordType.DeveloperName} != 'Churn_Protection', OR( CONTAINS( {!$UserRole.DeveloperName} , 'Consultant'), CONTAINS( {!$UserRole.DeveloperName} , 'Client_Services'), CONTAINS( {!$UserRole.DeveloperName} , 'Support'), {!myVariable_old.RecordType.DeveloperName} = 'Trial_Request' ) )

formulas.name: formula_myRule_92

recordUpdates.name: myRule_128_A1
recordUpdates.label: Update Request Status to Pending Client

recordUpdates.name: myRule_139_A1
recordUpdates.label: Opp AS Status and AS List Price Upd
